name: Spanish
note: Grade of C (2.0) or higher required in all courses. Four courses beyond Intermediate Spanish II (SPA-225). SPA-148 may count as one with consent of department chair. Elementary Spanish (SPA-115/125), Spanish Review and Preparation (SPA-135), and Intermediate Spanish (SPA-215/225) do not count.

sections.label: Four Courses Beyond SPA-225
sections.description: Four courses in Spanish beyond Intermediate Spanish II (SPA-225).
